title: Rainyday Notifier
description: A client pinging/notifier mod for the Rainyday server.
body:
### Rainyday Notifier

#### A mod that pings / notifies the user when their name is used in the chat, or if some other important action has been taken (Selling items, unlocking points, etc)

### Note! Versioning starting with 1.8 and after will include game version, such as "1.8-1.21.4". Versions before this could change from 1.6 to 1.7 because one was made for 1.21.0 and another 1.21.1

---

### Features

* Pings you when stuff happens!

---

### Installation

* Place the jar file in your ``mods`` folder. 
  * This is a Fabric mod, thus will not work with Forge.

---

### No Forge?

Correct.
